questions.q: A and B are partners in a firm sharing profits and losses in the ratio 3:1. The capital of A and B are as follows: A = Rs. 1,50,000, B = Rs. 75,000. Calculate the value of goodwill.

X, Y and Z are partners sharing profits and losses in the ratio 5:7:3. The balance sheet of X, Y and Z as on 31st March, 2022 was as follows: Assets: Rs. 5,00,000, Liabilities: Rs. 1,50,000. Calculate the value of goodwill.

ABC Ltd. was formed on 1st April, 2018. The balance sheet as on 31st March, 2022 was as follows: Assets: Rs. 3,00,000, Liabilities: Rs. 1,50,000. The profit-sharing ratio of A, B and C is 2:3:5. Calculate the value of goodwill.

M and N are partners in a firm sharing profits and losses in the ratio 3:2. The capital of M and N are as follows: M = Rs. 1,00,000, N = Rs. 80,000. The goodwill of the firm is Rs. 24,000. Calculate the value of M's share in the goodwill.

P, Q and R are partners in a firm. The balance sheet of P, Q and R as on 31st March, 2022 was as follows: Assets: Rs. 4,00,000, Liabilities: Rs. 1,50,000. The profit-sharing ratio of P, Q and R is 5:7:3. If the value of goodwill is Rs. 90,000, calculate the value of P's share in the goodwill.

ABC Ltd. was formed on 1st April, 2018. The balance sheet as on 31st March, 2022 was as follows: Assets: Rs. 3,50,000, Liabilities: Rs. 1,50,000. The profit-sharing ratio of A, B and C is 3:2:5. Calculate the value of goodwill.

X and Y are partners in a firm sharing profits and losses in the ratio 2:3. The capital of X and Y are as follows: X = Rs. 80,000, Y = Rs. 1,20,000. The goodwill of the firm is Rs. 32,000. Calculate the value of Y's share in the goodwill.

M and N are partners in a firm. The balance sheet of M and N as on 31st March, 2022 was as follows: Assets: Rs. 5,00,000, Liabilities: Rs. 1,25,000. The profit-sharing ratio of M and N is 4:6. If the value of goodwill is Rs. 1,00,000, calculate the value of M's share in the goodwill.

ABC Ltd. was formed on 1st April, 2018. The balance sheet as on 31st March, 2022 was as follows: Assets: Rs. 4,00,000, Liabilities: Rs. 1,75,000. The profit-sharing ratio of A, B and C is 1:3:5. Calculate the value of goodwill.

P and Q are partners in a firm sharing profits and losses in the ratio 5:3. The capital of P and Q are as follows: P = Rs. 1,50,000, Q = Rs. 90,000. The goodwill of the firm is Rs. 45,000. Calculate the value of P's share in the goodwill.
